hyperedges.label: Flujo de resolución de tenant (middleware, resolve.ts, RPC, ARQUITECTURA)

Pipeline de notificaciones multi-tenant (outbox, canales, dedupe)
Motor de cold-start: contenido semilla + cuentas ancla + IA + influencers
Bloque 1 del moat mínimo viable de IA (producto completo)

nodes.label: hero-community-mobile.webp — mobile-cropped landing page hero photograph: a Latino family of four (mother, father, son, daughter) walking together on a sidewalk on a Brooklyn/NYC-style residential street at golden-hour sunset. Portrait/vertical crop (~9:16 impression). Family is positioned low in the frame (roughly bottom third), small relative to the overall composition, walking left-to-right along the sidewalk in front of brick apartment buildings with fire escapes. Father carries a cardboard moving box labeled 'FRAGIL / FAMILIA NYC' and wears a backpack; mother carries a vintage suitcase and a tote bag; two children (a boy in an orange hoodie, a girl in a lavender sweater) walk beside them. Background shows a tall wooden utility pole with power lines and an elevated subway train crossing an overhead trestle, framed against a warm orange-pink sunset sky. The crop is loose/environmental (full street scene, not a tight face crop), leaving substantial empty sky/pole/wire space in the upper two-thirds of the frame — likely intentional so a gradient scrim and headline text can sit over that upper region while the family remains visible near the bottom, consistent with project notes that this asset's crop is coupled to hero layout CSS (padding-bottom, scrim gradient).
nodes.norm_label: hero-community-mobile.webp — mobile-cropped landing page hero photograph: a latino family of four (mother, father, son, daughter) walking together on a sidewalk on a brooklyn/nyc-style residential street at golden-hour sunset. portrait/vertical crop (~9:16 impression). family is positioned low in the frame (roughly bottom third), small relative to the overall composition, walking left-to-right along the sidewalk in front of brick apartment buildings with fire escapes. father carries a cardboard moving box labeled 'fragil / familia nyc' and wears a backpack; mother carries a vintage suitcase and a tote bag; two children (a boy in an orange hoodie, a girl in a lavender sweater) walk beside them. background shows a tall wooden utility pole with power lines and an elevated subway train crossing an overhead trestle, framed against a warm orange-pink sunset sky. the crop is loose/environmental (full street scene, not a tight face crop), leaving substantial empty sky/pole/wire space in the upper two-thirds of the frame — likely intentional so a gradient scrim and headline text can sit over that upper region while the family remains visible near the bottom, consistent with project notes that this asset's crop is coupled to hero layout css (padding-bottom, scrim gradient).

nodes.label: Depicted subject: a Latino immigrant family (two parents, son, daughter) walking together carrying luggage and a moving box — visual representation of 'community' and family unity for the Comunidad Latina platform
nodes.norm_label: depicted subject: a latino immigrant family (two parents, son, daughter) walking together carrying luggage and a moving box — visual representation of 'community' and family unity for the comunidad latina platform

nodes.label: Immigration/relocation narrative theme — cardboard box explicitly labeled 'FRAGIL' and 'FAMILIA NYC', a suitcase, and a tote bag signal a family in the midst of moving/settling into a new city, echoing the platform's mission for Latino immigrants in the US
nodes.norm_label: immigration/relocation narrative theme — cardboard box explicitly labeled 'fragil' and 'familia nyc', a suitcase, and a tote bag signal a family in the midst of moving/settling into a new city, echoing the platform's mission for latino immigrants in the us

nodes.label: Urban NYC/Brooklyn-style setting — elevated subway train on a steel trestle, wooden utility poles with overhead wires, brick tenement buildings with iron fire escapes, parked cars along the curb; grounds the scene in a specific US immigrant-community neighborhood context

nodes.label: Rationale: framing/crop of this mobile hero asset is tightly coupled to hero section layout CSS (bottom padding sizing, gradient scrim placement) — the family subject sits low in frame with generous sky/negative space above for text and scrim, so re-cropping or swapping this asset without checking layout CSS risks breaking the art direction (per project memory: longer demonym/gentilicio text is a known overlap risk)

nodes.label: nano banana per-tenant branding asset generation pipeline
nodes.norm_label: nano banana per-tenant branding asset generation pipeline

nodes.label: Fan-out on read + cache de ranking (D1)
nodes.rationale: Fan-out on write explota storage con miles de feeds multi-tenant; RLS ya filtra por tenant.
nodes.norm_label: fan-out on read + cache de ranking (d1)

nodes.label: Paginación keyset sobre rank_score+UUID v7 (D2)
nodes.rationale: O(1) a cualquier profundidad; UUID v7 monotónico da cursor estable, evita offset O(n).

nodes.label: Realtime Broadcast from Database (D3)
nodes.rationale: Patrón 2026 recomendado; escala a decenas de miles de conexiones, una escritura = un fan-out.

nodes.label: rank_score: bandas de prioridad + decaimiento (D4)
nodes.rationale: Multiplicador de banda (1e12) garantiza Boost Max > Plus > Básico > Premium > Gratis siempre.

nodes.label: Inyección server-side de ads por slots (D5)
nodes.rationale: Solo Feed Principal mezcla ads; slotting server-side evita manipulación de facturación/targeting.
nodes.norm_label: inyeccion server-side de ads por slots (d5)

nodes.label: Trust Score event-sourced (D6)
nodes.rationale: trust_events append-only + trust_scores materializado: auditable, anti-abuso, reversible.

nodes.label: Historias 24h vía partición diaria + DROP PARTITION (D7)
nodes.rationale: DROP de partición es O(1) e instantáneo vs DELETE masivo que genera bloat y vacuum pesado.
nodes.norm_label: historias 24h via particion diaria + drop partition (d7)

nodes.label: Notificaciones: Outbox + fan-out worker (D8)
nodes.rationale: Desacopla el disparador de la entrega (in-app/push/email); retries idempotentes.

nodes.label: qa_votes con constraint único (D9)
nodes.rationale: Constraint único (user, answer) previene doble voto; contador materializado para orden rápido.

nodes.label: Idempotency-Key en mutaciones con pago/notificación (D10)
nodes.rationale: Stripe Connect + push no toleran duplicados; tabla idempotency_keys en cada mutación.

nodes.label: Principio transversal tenant_id + RLS por dominio
nodes.rationale: tenant_id claim del JWT resuelto por dominio; primer discriminante de cardinalidad en índices.
nodes.norm_label: principio transversal tenant_id + rls por dominio

nodes.label: Single Next.js app (no monorepo)
nodes.rationale: N dominios usan el mismo código, se diferencian solo por tenant_id; monorepo añadiría fricción sin beneficio.

nodes.label: Flujo de creación de tenant (form → API → Vercel Domains)
nodes.norm_label: flujo de creacion de tenant (form → api → vercel domains)

nodes.label: Deduplicación de notificaciones vía Redis (Upstash)
nodes.rationale: Evita reenvío duplicado dentro de ventana de 5 min por tenant+user+tipo.

nodes.label: Broadcast global vía flag is_global_broadcast
nodes.rationale: Elegido sobre fan-out: escala media esperada, simple, sin contención severa; upgrade path si crece a >10M users.

nodes.label: Estrategia de secrets en 3 niveles (Vercel/Supabase/tenant_settings)
nodes.rationale: No hay env vars por tenant en Vercel; RLS + tenant_id manejan la segregación de datos.

nodes.label: Tesis: el diseño es la primera señal de confianza
nodes.rationale: Para un inmigrante ya estafado, en 3 segundos decide visualmente si 'parece serio' o 'otra trampa'.
nodes.norm_label: tesis: el diseno es la primera senal de confianza

nodes.label: 5 principios rectores de diseño
nodes.rationale: Calidez sin infantilizar, confianza como sistema visual, claridad radical, progresividad, anti-scroll.

nodes.label: Arquitectura de tokens de 3 capas (white-label)
nodes.rationale: Admin de tenant solo controla una capa angosta; primitivos y semánticos quedan fijos, garantiza calidad premium.

nodes.label: Brand color pipeline (validación + escala tonal automática)
nodes.rationale: El hex del tenant nunca se usa directo; pasa por validación de contraste y generación de escala tonal.
nodes.norm_label: brand color pipeline (validacion + escala tonal automatica)

nodes.label: Tipografía: General Sans/Clash Display + Plus Jakarta Sans
nodes.norm_label: tipografia: general sans/clash display + plus jakarta sans

nodes.label: Paleta de neutros cálidos (nunca gris frío puro)
nodes.norm_label: paleta de neutros calidos (nunca gris frio puro)

nodes.label: Patrón Double-Bezel (shell exterior + core interior)
nodes.rationale: Ninguna tarjeta de confianza alta se apoya plana; sombras difusas cálidas dan sensación premium.

nodes.label: Dark mode como paleta tonal propia (no inversión)
nodes.rationale: Nunca #000000 puro; color de marca se desatura y sube luminosidad automáticamente en dark.
nodes.norm_label: dark mode como paleta tonal propia (no inversion)

nodes.label: Checklist WCAG AA aplicado al producto
nodes.norm_label: checklist wcag aa aplicado al producto

nodes.label: Gramática visual fija del Trust Score
nodes.norm_label: gramatica visual fija del trust score

nodes.label: Diseño offline-first (skeletons, acciones encoladas)
nodes.rationale: Público objetivo usa datos móviles limitados; skeletons y banners de conexión evitan bloqueo total.

nodes.label: Estados vacíos que guían (nunca pantalla en blanco)
nodes.rationale: Cada estado vacío incluye ilustración + mensaje cálido + acción concreta que resuelve el vacío.
nodes.norm_label: estados vacios que guian (nunca pantalla en blanco)

nodes.label: Tabla de guardrails white-label (fijo vs configurable)
nodes.rationale: El admin nunca edita el DOM directo; solo alimenta un pipeline que garantiza consistencia premium.

links.source_location: línea 15 ('Qué cambió de la V3 a la V4')

hyperedges.label: Flujo de resolución de tenant (middleware, resolve.ts, RPC, ARQUITECTURA)
Linaje de versiones del Plan Maestro (V1 → V2 → V3 → V4)
Bloqueantes conjuntos para publicar en tiendas de apps
Defense-in-depth multi-tenant isolation across data, routing, and moderation layers
Creator Marketplace escrow-like payment flow with low-commission positioning
Diaspora-specific differentiators identified via competitor benchmark and designed in data/AI docs
Trust Score: motor backend, gramática visual y riesgo de honeypot
Seguridad RLS multi-tenant: diseño, roles y crítica adversarial
Pipeline de notificaciones multi-tenant (outbox, canales, dedupe)
Motor de cold-start: contenido semilla + cuentas ancla + IA + influencers
Bloque 1 del moat mínimo viable de IA (producto completo)
Coordinación cruzada del deadline de marca octubre 2026
